name: WhatsApp Job Hunt AI Agent (Groq - Free)

options.systemMessage:
You are Ravi's personal AI Job Hunt Assistant running inside WhatsApp.

Your job is to help Ravi with his software engineering job search.

You have access to these tools:
1. google_sheets_job_tracker - Read and write job applications to Google Sheets
2. knowledge_base_resume - Look up Ravi's resume, skills, and preferences
3. gmail_send_application - Send job application emails on Ravi's behalf

What you can do:
- Find and list jobs from the tracker
- Add new jobs to track
- Update application status (Applied, Interview, Rejected, Offer)
- Show stats: how many applied, pending, interviews, offers
- Draft and send application emails
- Answer questions about Ravi's skills and experience

Always respond in a friendly, concise manner suitable for WhatsApp.
Use short paragraphs. Use emojis sparingly.
If asked for stats, always pull from Google Sheets first.

Ravi's target roles: Python Developer, Backend Engineer, Automation Engineer, Software Engineer
Ravi's location: Hyderabad, India
Ravi's experience: 0-1 year (Fresher + Trainee at Algonox Technologies)
Key skills: Python, Docker, Oracle SQL, MySQL, OCR, REST APIs, Linux

parameters.name: google_sheets_job_tracker
parameters.description:
Use this tool to manage Ravi's job application tracker in Google Sheets.

Actions available:
- 'get_all_jobs': Returns all jobs in the tracker with their status
- 'get_stats': Returns counts by status (Applied, Interview, Rejected, Offer, Not Applied)
- 'add_job': Adds a new job to track. Requires: company, role, location, job_url
- 'update_status': Updates a job's status. Requires: company, new_status
- 'get_pending': Returns all jobs not yet applied to
- 'get_interviews': Returns all jobs with Interview status

Always use this tool when Ravi asks about his applications, stats, or wants to add/update a job.

values.name: action
values.stringValue: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('action', 'The action: get_all_jobs, get_stats, add_job, update_status, get_pending, get_interviews', 'string') }}

values.name: new_status
values.stringValue: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('new_status', 'New status value: Not Applied, Applied, Interview, Rejected, Offer (for update_status)', 'string') }}

parameters.name: knowledge_base_resume
parameters.description:
Search Ravi's resume and personal information to answer questions about his skills, experience, projects, and job preferences.

Contains:
- Full resume details (education, experience, projects)
- Skills: Python, Docker, Oracle SQL, MySQL, REST APIs, Linux, OCR, ABBYY
- Target companies and roles
- Salary expectations
- Notice period and availability
- Cover letter templates

values.name: query
values.stringValue: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('query', 'What to look up about Ravi - skills, experience, projects, preferences etc', 'string') }}

parameters.name: gmail_send_application
parameters.description:
Send a job application email on Ravi's behalf.

Use this when Ravi asks to apply to a specific job or send a follow-up.
Always confirm the details before sending.
The email will be sent from Ravi's Gmail account.

Requires: to_email, subject, company_name, role, cover_message

values.name: to_email
values.stringValue: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('to_email', 'Recruiter or HR email address to send application to', 'string') }}

values.name: company_name
values.stringValue: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('company_name', 'Name of the company being applied to', 'string') }}

values.name: cover_message
values.stringValue: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('cover_message', 'The personalized cover note for this application', 'string') }}

parameters.subject: =Job Application - {{ $json.role }} at {{ $json.company_name }}
parameters.message:
=Dear Hiring Team,

I am writing to express my interest in the {{ $json.role }} position at {{ $json.company_name }}.

{{ $json.cover_message }}

I am a Computer Science graduate (CGPA: 8.01) currently working as a Software Engineer Trainee at Algonox Technologies, Hyderabad. My key skills include:

- Python backend development with production experience
- Docker containerization and Linux deployment
- OCR pipeline development (ABBYY, document classification)
- Database management: Oracle SQL, MySQL, MS SQL Server
- REST API development and microservices

I have hands-on production experience deploying and maintaining real-time systems. I would love to bring this experience to {{ $json.company_name }}.

Please find my resume attached.

Best regards,
Raviteja Vallakatla
ravitejavallakatla@gmail.com
+91 7569915450
